englishDefinitions: A reference to Jack Lemmon, the actor, in the 1960 film The Apartment.
Used as a cultural reference to a well-known performance by Jack Lemmon in that movie.
persianTranslation: اشاره به بازی جک لمون در فیلم «آپارتمان»
examples: The critic compared his performance to Jack Lemmon in The Apartment.
For classic film fans, Jack Lemmon in The Apartment is unforgettable.
The line is a cultural reference to Jack Lemmon in The Apartment.
